bracu_official.summary: This announcement provides the schedule for the undergraduate "Wishlist" event, planning for the Fall 2026 semester.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted a seminar focusing on raising awareness about cervical cancer to educate the community.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: An ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative has been launched at BRAC University to promote and encourage sustainable choices among students and staff.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship
bracu_official.summary: A law graduate from BRAC University has been awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.
